original.custom-css: padding-top: clamp(16px, 4vw, 48px); padding-right: clamp(16px, 4vw, 48px); padding-bottom: clamp(16px, 4vw, 48px); padding-left: clamp(16px, 4vw, 48px); margin-top: var(--spacing-y) !important; margin-bottom: var(--spacing-y) !important; margin-right: var(--spacing-x) !important; margin-left: var(--spacing-x) !important; border-top-left-radius: clamp(4px, 1vw, 12px); border-top-right-radius: clamp(4px, 1vw, 12px); border-bottom-left-radius: clamp(4px, 1vw, 12px); border-bottom-right-radius: clamp(4px, 1vw, 12px);
